requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — TTBS Conformity and UL 1973 / IEC 62619 as International Baseline for T&T BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——TTBS合格评定及UL 1973 / IEC 62619作为特立尼达和多巴哥BESS的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——TTBS合格評定及UL 1973 / IEC 62619作為千里達及托巴哥BESS的國際基準

summary.en: The Trinidad and Tobago Bureau of Standards (TTBS) is the national standards body responsible for developing and adopting national standards and administering conformity assessment for regulated products in Trinidad and Tobago. TTBS adopts international standards (primarily ISO, IEC, and ASTM) and publishes Trinidad and Tobago Standards (TTS). For BESS battery cell and module safety, UL 1973 (Standard for Batteries for Use in Stationary, Vehicle Auxiliary Power, and Light Electric Rail (LER) Applications) is the leading safety standard for stationary BESS batteries in US-heritage markets and is the standard most likely to be referenced by T&T project owners, insurers, and authorities for large-format lithium BESS cells and modules. IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally recognised IEC-route safety standard and may also be referenced in project specifications. A specific mandatory TTBS conformity assessment requirement for stationary BESS cells and modules had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official TTBS sources as of the dataset date; exporters must verify the current TTBS regulated-product scope directly with TTBS before shipment.
summary.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥标准局（TTBS）是负责制定和采纳国家标准、管理受监管产品合格评定的国家标准机构。TTBS采纳国际标准（主要为ISO、IEC和ASTM）并发布特立尼达和多巴哥标准（TTS）。在BESS电池电芯和模组安全方面，UL 1973（固定式、车辆辅助电源及轻轨应用电池标准）是美国传统市场固定式BESS电池的主要安全标准，最有可能被T&T项目业主、保险公司和主管机关针对大型锂BESS电芯和模组引用。IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是国际公认的IEC路径安全标准，也可能在项目规格中被引用。截至本数据集日期，TTBS针对固定式BESS电芯和模组的具体强制合格评定要求尚未从可公开获取的官方TTBS来源得到确认；出口商在出货前须直接向TTBS核实现行受监管产品范围。
summary.zht: 千里達及托巴哥標準局（TTBS）是負責制定和採納國家標準、管理受監管產品合格評定的國家標準機構。TTBS採納國際標準（主要為ISO、IEC和ASTM）並發布千里達及托巴哥標準（TTS）。在BESS電池電芯和模組安全方面，UL 1973（固定式、車輛輔助電源及輕軌應用電池標準）是美國傳統市場固定式BESS電池的主要安全標準，最有可能被T&T項目業主、保險公司和主管機關針對大型鋰BESS電芯和模組引用。IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是國際公認的IEC路徑安全標準，也可能在項目規格中被引用。截至本數據集日期，TTBS針對固定式BESS電芯和模組的具體強制合格評定要求尚未從可公開獲取的官方TTBS來源得到確認；出口商在出貨前須直接向TTBS核實現行受監管產品範圍。

standards_or_laws: TTBS — Trinidad and Tobago Bureau of Standards (national standards body; adopts ISO/IEC/ASTM; administers conformity assessment; verify current regulated-product scope for BESS directly with TTBS)

UL 1973 — Standard for Batteries for Use in Stationary, Vehicle Auxiliary Power, and Light Electric Rail (LER) Applications (leading safety standard for stationary BESS batteries in US-heritage markets; expected baseline for T&T BESS cell/module safety)

IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected IEC-route baseline; may be referenced in project specifications alongside or instead of UL 1973)
UL 9540 — Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment (system-level safety and listing standard; may be required by project owners or insurers)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with UL 1973 or IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalents in T&T project technical specifications or TTBS conformity assessment. Exporters must obtain UL 1973 and/or IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited or UL-listed laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与UL 1973或IEC 62619协调，不被T&T项目技术规格或TTBS合格评定接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可或UL认可实验室取得UL 1973和/或IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與UL 1973或IEC 62619協調，不被T&T項目技術規格或TTBS合格評定接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可或UL認可實驗室取得UL 1973和/或IEC 62619測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025; not equivalent to UL 1973 or IEC 62619 for T&T purposes)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary; not equivalent to UL 1973 or IEC 62619)

gap.en: Gap: UL 1973 listing (and/or IEC 62619 type-test certification) is the internationally expected safety evidence for stationary BESS cells and modules in US-heritage markets including Trinidad and Tobago. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 compliance alone is insufficient for T&T project acceptance or TTBS conformity. Exporters should: (a) verify the current TTBS regulated-product scope for stationary BESS cells, modules, and systems directly with TTBS to confirm whether mandatory conformity certification is required; (b) obtain UL 1973 listing from a UL-authorised certification body for cells and modules — UL 1973 listing is the standard most likely required by T&T project owners and insurers; (c) where IEC 62619 is specified in project requirements, obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (d) confirm with the project owner and insurer which standard (UL 1973 or IEC 62619) is the contractual requirement for the specific T&T project; (e) obtain UL 9540 system-level listing if required by project owners, insurers, or local authority having jurisdiction.
gap.zh: 差距：UL 1973列名（和/或IEC 62619型式试验认证）是包括特立尼达和多巴哥在内的美国传统市场固定式BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全证据。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023合规证明不足以满足T&T项目验收或TTBS合格评定要求。出口商应：（a）直接向TTBS核实固定式BESS电芯、模组和系统的现行TTBS受监管产品范围，确认市场准入前是否须取得强制合格认证；（b）从UL授权认证机构取得电芯和模组的UL 1973列名——UL 1973列名是T&T项目业主和保险公司最有可能要求的标准；（c）若项目要求规定IEC 62619，从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书；（d）向项目业主和保险公司确认特定T&T项目的合同要求标准（UL 1973或IEC 62619）；（e）若项目业主、保险公司或具有管辖权的地方主管机关有要求，取得UL 9540系统级列名。
gap.zht: 差距：UL 1973列名（和/或IEC 62619型式試驗認證）是包括千里達及托巴哥在內的美國傳統市場固定式BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全證據。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023合規證明不足以滿足T&T項目驗收或TTBS合格評定要求。出口商應：（a）直接向TTBS核實固定式BESS電芯、模組和系統的現行TTBS受監管產品範圍，確認市場准入前是否須取得強制合格認證；（b）從UL授權認證機構取得電芯和模組的UL 1973列名——UL 1973列名是T&T項目業主和保險公司最有可能要求的標準；（c）若項目要求規定IEC 62619，從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（d）向項目業主和保險公司確認特定T&T項目的合同要求標準（UL 1973或IEC 62619）；（e）若項目業主、保險公司或具有管轄權的地方主管機關有要求，取得UL 9540系統級列名。

mandatory_status.target: UL 1973 listing is the expected baseline for T&T BESS project acceptance; specific mandatory TTBS conformity certification scope for stationary BESS had not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with TTBS; IEC 62619 may be required in project specifications as an alternative or additional requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is equivalent to UL 1973 or IEC 62619 for T&T purposes

source.publisher: TTBS — Trinidad and Tobago Bureau of Standards (national standards and conformity assessment body)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UL 1973 listing and/or IEC 62619 type-test certification is the internationally expected safety evidence for stationary BESS cells and modules in Trinidad and Tobago. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 compliance alone is not sufficient for T&T project acceptance. Verify TTBS current regulated-product scope for stationary BESS, obtain UL 1973 listing (and/or IEC 62619 type-test evidence) from an accredited or UL-authorised laboratory, and confirm standard requirements with the T&T project owner and insurer before shipment. Also confirm UL 9540 system-level listing requirement with the project owner and authority having jurisdiction.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UL 1973列名和/或IEC 62619型式试验认证是特立尼达和多巴哥固定式BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全证据。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023合规证明不足以满足T&T项目验收要求。出货前请核实TTBS现行固定式BESS受监管产品范围，从认可或UL授权实验室取得UL 1973列名（和/或IEC 62619型式试验证据），并向T&T项目业主和保险公司确认标准要求。同时向项目业主和具有管辖权的主管机关确认UL 9540系统级列名要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UL 1973列名和/或IEC 62619型式試驗認證是千里達及托巴哥固定式BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全證據。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023合規證明不足以滿足T&T項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實TTBS現行固定式BESS受監管產品範圍，從認可或UL授權實驗室取得UL 1973列名（和/或IEC 62619型式試驗證據），並向T&T項目業主和保險公司確認標準要求。同時向項目業主和具有管轄權的主管機關確認UL 9540系統級列名要求。

requirement_topic.en: UL 9540 System-Level Safety Listing and RIC Approval Process for BESS in Trinidad and Tobago
requirement_topic.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥BESS的UL 9540系统级安全列名和RIC审批流程
requirement_topic.zht: 千里達及托巴哥BESS的UL 9540系統級安全列名和RIC審批流程

summary.en: UL 9540 (Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment) is the US-heritage system-level safety listing standard for complete BESS installations, covering the battery system, power conversion system (PCS/inverter), battery management system (BMS), and thermal management system as an integrated unit. In US-heritage markets, UL 9540 listing is typically required by local Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ), insurers, and project owners before BESS commissioning and is considered the system-level counterpart to UL 1973 (cell/module safety) and UL 9540A (fire testing). For Trinidad and Tobago, UL 9540 listing is the expected system-level safety evidence for utility-scale and C&I BESS. The RIC (Regulated Industries Commission) oversees licensing and may require demonstration of applicable safety standards compliance as part of generation or storage licence applications. A specific mandatory UL 9540 listing requirement under T&T law or TTBS regulation had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; confirm current requirements with TTBS, T&TEC, and RIC before equipment procurement.
summary.zh: UL 9540（储能系统和设备标准）是美国传统市场完整BESS装置的系统级安全列名标准，覆盖电池系统、储能变流器（PCS/逆变器）、电池管理系统（BMS）和热管理系统作为一个整体单元。在美国传统市场，UL 9540列名通常在BESS调试前由地方主管机关（AHJ）、保险公司和项目业主要求，被视为UL 1973（电芯/模组安全）和UL 9540A（消防测试）的系统级对应标准。对于特立尼达和多巴哥，UL 9540列名是公用事业规模和工商业BESS的预期系统级安全证据。受监管行业委员会（RIC）负责许可证监管，可能在发电或储能许可证申请中要求证明符合适用安全标准。截至本数据集日期，T&T法律或TTBS法规下的具体强制UL 9540列名要求尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认；在设备采购前请向TTBS、T&TEC和RIC确认现行要求。
summary.zht: UL 9540（儲能系統和設備標準）是美國傳統市場完整BESS裝置的系統級安全列名標準，覆蓋電池系統、儲能變流器（PCS/逆變器）、電池管理系統（BMS）和熱管理系統作為一個整體單元。在美國傳統市場，UL 9540列名通常在BESS調試前由地方主管機關（AHJ）、保險公司和項目業主要求，被視為UL 1973（電芯/模組安全）和UL 9540A（消防測試）的系統級對應標準。對於千里達及托巴哥，UL 9540列名是公用事業規模和工商業BESS的預期系統級安全證據。受監管行業委員會（RIC）負責許可證監管，可能在發電或儲能許可證申請中要求證明符合適用安全標準。截至本數據集日期，T&T法律或TTBS法規下的具體強制UL 9540列名要求尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認；在設備採購前請向TTBS、T&TEC和RIC確認現行要求。

standards_or_laws: UL 9540 — Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment (system-level safety listing standard; expected baseline for complete BESS in US-heritage markets including T&T; covers battery, PCS, BMS, and thermal management as integrated unit)

UL 9540A — Standard Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems (fire testing standard; UL 9540A test results are used to determine BESS installation separation distances under NFPA 855; often required as part of UL 9540 listing)
RIC — Regulated Industries Commission (electricity sector licensing authority; licence and safety standard compliance requirements must be confirmed directly with RIC)

summary.en: China's system-level BESS safety standard is GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) and GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems), assessed under project-level NEA approval procedures. There is no Chinese equivalent to UL 9540 system-level listing — the Chinese domestic approval process is utility-operator and NEA-based rather than an independent third-party listing programme. Chinese BESS manufacturers must obtain UL 9540 listing from a UL-authorised certification body for T&T projects; there is no mutual recognition between Chinese domestic BESS system approvals and UL 9540.
summary.zh: 中国系统级BESS安全标准为GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）和GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件），通过项目级NEA审批程序进行评估。中国没有等同于UL 9540系统级列名的标准——中国国内审批流程基于电网运营商和NEA，而非独立的第三方列名计划。中国BESS制造商须从UL授权认证机构取得T&T项目的UL 9540列名；中国国内BESS系统审批与UL 9540之间不存在相互认可。
summary.zht: 中國系統級BESS安全標準為GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）和GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件），通過項目級NEA審批程序進行評估。中國沒有等同於UL 9540系統級列名的標準——中國國內審批流程基於電網運營商和NEA，而非獨立的第三方列名計畫。中國BESS製造商須從UL授權認證機構取得T&T項目的UL 9540列名；中國國內BESS系統審批與UL 9540之間不存在相互認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (system-level framework; voluntary; not equivalent to UL 9540)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (system-level technical requirements; not equivalent to UL 9540 for T&T purposes)

gap.en: Gap: UL 9540 listing is the expected system-level safety evidence for complete BESS in T&T. No Chinese domestic BESS system approval is equivalent to UL 9540. Key actions: (a) obtain UL 9540 system-level listing from a UL-authorised certification body — this typically requires UL 1973 cell/module listing, UL 9540A fire testing, and system-level electrical safety testing; (b) confirm with TTBS, T&TEC, and RIC whether UL 9540 listing is a mandatory requirement for T&T BESS installations or whether equivalent IEC-route certification (IEC 62933-5-2 system safety) is accepted; (c) engage RIC to understand the storage licence application process and technical safety requirements for the specific installed capacity; (d) ensure UL 9540 listing covers the specific BESS configuration (cell chemistry, capacity, PCS make and model, BMS version) for the T&T project — listing is system-configuration-specific.
gap.zh: 差距：UL 9540列名是T&T完整BESS的预期系统级安全证据。中国国内BESS系统审批均不等同于UL 9540。关键措施：（a）从UL授权认证机构取得UL 9540系统级列名——这通常需要UL 1973电芯/模组列名、UL 9540A消防测试和系统级电气安全测试；（b）向TTBS、T&TEC和RIC确认UL 9540列名是否为T&T BESS装置的强制要求，或等效IEC路径认证（IEC 62933-5-2系统安全）是否可被接受；（c）与RIC沟通了解针对特定装机容量的储能许可证申请流程和技术安全要求；（d）确保UL 9540列名涵盖T&T项目的特定BESS配置（电芯化学体系、容量、PCS品牌和型号、BMS版本）——列名具有系统配置特异性。
gap.zht: 差距：UL 9540列名是T&T完整BESS的預期系統級安全證據。中國國內BESS系統審批均不等同於UL 9540。關鍵措施：（a）從UL授權認證機構取得UL 9540系統級列名——這通常需要UL 1973電芯/模組列名、UL 9540A消防測試和系統級電氣安全測試；（b）向TTBS、T&TEC和RIC確認UL 9540列名是否為T&T BESS裝置的強制要求，或等效IEC路徑認證（IEC 62933-5-2系統安全）是否可被接受；（c）與RIC溝通了解針對特定裝機容量的儲能許可證申請流程和技術安全要求；（d）確保UL 9540列名涵蓋T&T項目的特定BESS配置（電芯化學體系、容量、PCS品牌和型號、BMS版本）——列名具有系統配置特異性。

mandatory_status.target: Expected by project owners and insurers for utility-scale and C&I BESS; specific mandatory regulatory requirement status under T&T law unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with TTBS, T&TEC, and RIC
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent — GB/T system approvals via NEA are not equivalent to UL 9540 listing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UL 9540 system-level listing is the expected safety credential for complete BESS installations in Trinidad and Tobago and is required by project owners and insurers operating under US-heritage standards. No Chinese GB-based system approval is equivalent to UL 9540. Obtain UL 9540 listing (which typically bundles UL 1973, UL 9540A, and system electrical safety testing) from a UL-authorised certification body. Confirm TTBS, T&TEC, and RIC requirements for the specific project capacity and installation type before committing to a test and certification programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UL 9540系统级列名是特立尼达和多巴哥完整BESS装置的预期安全资质，依据美国传统标准运营的项目业主和保险公司均有此要求。中国基于GB的系统审批均不等同于UL 9540。须从UL授权认证机构取得UL 9540列名（通常涵盖UL 1973、UL 9540A和系统电气安全测试）。在启动测试和认证计划前，请向TTBS、T&TEC和RIC确认针对特定项目容量和安装类型的要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UL 9540系統級列名是千里達及托巴哥完整BESS裝置的預期安全資質，依據美國傳統標準運營的項目業主和保險公司均有此要求。中國基於GB的系統審批均不等同於UL 9540。須從UL授權認證機構取得UL 9540列名（通常涵蓋UL 1973、UL 9540A和系統電氣安全測試）。在啟動測試和認證計畫前，請向TTBS、T&TEC和RIC確認針對特定項目容量和安裝類型的要求。
